hero.title: LifeSkillify Community
hero.description: Connect with fellow learners, share your growth journey, and get inspired by real stories of transformation.

featuredMembers.name: Ananya M.
featuredMembers.bio: Building better habits one lesson at a time. Love the communication skills track!

featuredMembers.name: Rohan S.
featuredMembers.bio: Productivity nerd. Time blocking changed my work life completely.

featuredMembers.name: Priya K.
featuredMembers.bio: 30-day streak champion! Mental wellness lessons are my favorite.

featuredMembers.name: Arjun T.
featuredMembers.bio: Finally understanding personal finance. The budgeting challenge was a game-changer.

discussions.author: Ananya M.
discussions.title: Active listening completely changed my relationship with my roommate
discussions.excerpt: I tried the paraphrasing technique from today's lesson and my roommate actually said 'wow, you really get me.' Small change, huge impact.

discussions.author: Rohan S.
discussions.title: Completed the No-Phone Morning challenge — here's what I learned
discussions.excerpt: Day 3 was the hardest. But by day 5, I was getting more done before 9 AM than I used to all morning. Highly recommend.

discussions.author: Priya K.
discussions.title: The RAIN technique saved me during a stressful client call
discussions.excerpt: I felt panic rising mid-call. Did a quick RAIN check-in (recognized, allowed, investigated, nurtured) and was able to respond calmly.

discussions.author: Arjun T.
discussions.title: Budget Awareness Week results: I was spending 40% on food delivery
discussions.excerpt: Tracking expenses for 7 days was eye-opening. Didn't realize how much I was spending on convenience. Already meal-prepping now.

discussions.author: Meera D.
discussions.title: How I finally learned to say no without guilt
discussions.excerpt: The boundaries lesson + community support helped me decline a project that would have burned me out. Self-care isn't selfish.

discussions.author: Vikram P.
discussions.title: Think Like a Pro course — best decision I made this month
discussions.excerpt: The decision-making frameworks are practical and immediately applicable. Used the pros/cons matrix at work yesterday.
